title: Admin Registration Codes Stats Success Response
description: Code counts for the admin Registration Codes page tiles. Unfiltered: describes the whole set the caller can see, so `total` equals the unfiltered `totalCount` the list endpoint returns for the same caller. The list is not group/ACL scoped, so neither is this. Contract: available + used === total.

available.description: Codes with no consumer (consumed IS NULL / is_consumed = false).
